highlights.description: Automatic subtitle generation with STT (Speech-to-Text) support
OmniVoice integration for unified TTS/STT provider abstraction
Dictionary-based case correction for proper noun capitalization in subtitles

added.description: Subtitle generator with STT support for automatic caption generation
`subtitle` CLI command for generating subtitles from audio
`stt` CLI command for speech-to-text transcription
Subtitle embedding support (soft subtitles) via ffmpeg
Subtitle burning support (hard-coded subtitles) via ffmpeg
Dictionary-based case correction with built-in tech terms
Custom dictionary support via JSON files
OmniVoice TTS provider wrapper for unified interface
OmniVoice STT provider wrapper for unified interface
TTS provider override and provider-specific settings clearing
Path sanitization for safe ffmpeg subprocess execution

changed.description: Refactored orchestrator and audio player for OmniVoice integration

documentation.description: Added complete workflow guide: Marp to video with subtitles
Added subtitle generation features to README
Added subtitle guide and dual-language TRD

chore.description: Fix lint errors and apply gofmt

highlights.description: Convert Marp presentations to narrated videos with AI-generated voiceovers
Multi-language transcript support with ElevenLabs TTS integration
Image-based video generation for reliable, high-quality output

added.description: CLI tool with `tts` and `video` subcommands
Marp markdown parser with voiceover comment extraction (`<!-- voiceover: ... -->`)
Pause directive support (`<!-- pause: 500 -->`) for timing control
ElevenLabs TTS integration for audio generation
Multi-language transcript package with JSON schema
Support for BCP-47 locale codes (en-US, es-ES, zh-Hans, fr-FR, etc.)
`tts` subcommand for generating audio from transcript.json files
TTS resume support with `--force` flag to skip existing audio files
Audio manifest for tracking generated files and durations
Image-based video generation using Marp PNG export
Video combining with optional crossfade transitions
Individual slide video export for platforms like Udemy
Progress bar during conversion with multi-stage tracking
`--verbose` flag for debug logging
Cross-platform support: macOS, Linux, Windows
Self-documenting intro example with 13 slides
Simplified Chinese and French translations for intro example

fixed.description: Nil pointer dereference with slog logger

documentation.description: Comprehensive README with installation, usage, and troubleshooting
Example presentation with OmniVoice TTS workflow
